release_notes: Telegram AI/Agent Bot API features (Guest Mode, private-chat streaming, bot-to-bot, business integration). Settings UI Refactoring (4-section sidebar, unified Extensions, declarative layouts, tooltips). Discord Allow-from by Username fix, Agent Loop Task Cancellation Safety, WebUI Missing OAuth Providers fix, Gateway Client Disconnect Stability, MCP Tools NameError fix, and README Localizations.

changes.note: Bumped packaged update manifest to v0.9.6.
Added WebUI login troubleshooting notice to update settings.
